# Jatin Verma - Full Stack Developer & UI/UX Designer

## About
Jatin Verma is a Full Stack Developer and UI/UX Designer based in Bhiwani, Haryana, India. He is currently pursuing a Master of Computer Applications (MCA) and has 3+ years of experience building modern web applications. He specializes in the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React, Node.js) along with Next.js, TypeScript, and cloud technologies.

## Technical Skills
- Frontend: React, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, GSAP, Framer Motion, Three.js
- Backend: Node.js, Express.js, Python
- Databases: MongoDB, MySQL, Redis, Firebase
- Cloud & DevOps: AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, Terraform, GitLab CI/CD
- Tools: Git, GitHub, VS Code

## Professional Experience
- Team Lead Frontend at SmallFare (March 2025 - June 2025)
- Full Stack MERN Development (June 2024 - Present)
- Frontend Development (June 2023 - Present)

## Notable Projects
- North Tech Hub (northtechhub.in) - Scalable e-commerce and online course platform with Razorpay payment integration
- Love File (lovefile.shop) - File conversion tool supporting image format conversion and PDF manipulation
- Chawla Architects (chawlaarchitects.com) - Professional architecture firm portfolio
- Acharam - Full stack e-commerce website with authentication and shopping cart
- Premium Construction - Construction company website with animations
- Averiq - Tech company website with modern design

## Services Offered
- Full Stack Web Development
- Frontend Development (React, Next.js)
- Backend Development (Node.js, Express)
- UI/UX Design
- E-commerce Development
- Portfolio & Business Websites
